homepage.heroSubline: Safe, efficient tree removal services in the Twin Cities. Protecting your property and ensuring peace of mind.
homepage.aboutTitle: Your Trusted Tree Removal Partner in Minneapolis
aboutText: Blue Ribbon Pruning started with a simple mission: to provide reliable and responsible tree removal services to our neighbors in Minneapolis. We saw a need for a company that understood the unique challenges of our local climate and landscape.

We believe in doing the job right, every time. That means using the best equipment, employing skilled professionals, and prioritizing safety above all else. We're committed to transparent communication and fair pricing.
We're proud to be a part of the Minneapolis community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible disposal and recycling practices.

valueProps.title: Safety First
valueProps.description: We prioritize the safety of your property and our team during every tree removal project.

valueProps.title: Experienced Arborists
valueProps.description: Our team includes certified arborists with years of experience in Minneapolis tree care.

valueProps.title: Efficient Service
valueProps.description: We complete projects quickly and efficiently, minimizing disruption to your property.

valueProps.title: Comprehensive Cleanup
valueProps.description: We leave your property clean and free of debris after every tree removal.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Get a Free Tree Removal Quote
homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us today for a no-obligation estimate. Protect your property from hazardous trees.

services.name: Tree Removal
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient removal of hazardous or unwanted trees.
services.description:
We specialize in the safe and efficient removal of trees of all sizes. Whether a tree is dead, diseased, or simply in the way, our experienced team has the expertise and equipment to handle the job. We understand the unique challenges of tree removal in Minneapolis, from navigating tight spaces to dealing with frozen ground in the winter. Our approach is thorough and safety-focused. We assess the tree's condition, identify potential hazards, and develop a detailed removal plan. We use specialized equipment, including cranes and aerial lifts, to safely remove trees in even the most challenging locations. After the tree is down, we handle all cleanup and debris removal, leaving your property clean and tidy.

We are fully licensed and insured, protecting you from liability. Our team is trained in the latest tree removal techniques and adheres to strict safety standards. We are committed to providing exceptional service at a fair price. We take pride in our work and strive to exceed your expectations. Dealing with storm damage? We offer emergency tree removal services to quickly address hazardous situations and prevent further damage to your property. Let us help you keep your property safe and beautiful.
process: Step 1: Assessment & Quote - We evaluate the tree and provide a free, detailed quote.
Step 2: Planning & Preparation - We develop a safe and efficient removal plan.
Step 3: Tree Removal - Our skilled team removes the tree using specialized equipment.
Step 4: Cleanup & Debris Removal - We remove all debris and leave your property clean.

faq.question: How do you determine the cost of tree removal?
faq.answer: The cost depends on several factors, including the size and species of the tree, its location, and the complexity of the removal process. We provide free, no-obligation quotes after assessing the tree.

faq.question: Are you insured?
faq.answer: Yes, we are fully insured. This protects you from liability in the event of an accident during the tree removal process. We can provide proof of insurance upon request.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for tree removal?
faq.answer: In some cases, a permit may be required for tree removal in Minneapolis. We can help you determine if a permit is necessary and assist with the application process.

services.name: Stump Grinding
services.shortDescription: Remove unsightly tree stumps and reclaim your yard.
services.description:
Don't let unsightly tree stumps detract from the beauty of your Minneapolis property. Blue Ribbon Pruning offers professional stump grinding services to completely remove tree stumps and restore your yard. Our stump grinders can handle stumps of all sizes and in any location, even in tight spaces or on uneven terrain. We grind the stump down below ground level, allowing you to replant grass, flowers, or even build a new structure. We understand that Minneapolis winters can be tough on yards, and exposed stumps can be a tripping hazard and attract pests. Removing the stump eliminates these problems and enhances the overall appearance of your property.

We take pride in our meticulous cleanup process. After grinding the stump, we remove the wood chips and debris, leaving your yard clean and ready for replanting. We can also provide topsoil and seed to help you restore the area to its original condition. We are committed to providing efficient, affordable, and reliable stump grinding services. Our experienced team uses the latest equipment and techniques to ensure a smooth and hassle-free experience. We are fully licensed and insured, protecting you from liability. Contact us today for a free quote and let us help you reclaim your yard.
process: Step 1: Stump Assessment - We assess the size and location of the stump.
Step 2: Grinding - We grind the stump down below ground level.
Step 3: Debris Removal - We remove wood chips and debris.
Step 4: Site Restoration - We restore the area with topsoil and seed (optional).

faq.question: How long does stump grinding take?
faq.answer: The time it takes to grind a stump depends on its size and the type of wood. Most stumps can be ground in a few hours.

faq.question: What happens to the wood chips?
faq.answer: We can either remove the wood chips or leave them for you to use as mulch. We will discuss your preferences during the initial assessment.

faq.question: Will stump grinding damage my yard?
faq.answer: We take precautions to minimize any damage to your yard during the stump grinding process. We use specialized equipment and techniques to protect surrounding vegetation and structures.

services.name: Tree Trimming
services.shortDescription: Maintain the health and beauty of your trees with professional trimming.
services.description:
Regular tree trimming is essential for maintaining the health, safety, and aesthetics of your trees. Blue Ribbon Pruning offers professional tree trimming services to homeowners and businesses in Minneapolis. Our experienced arborists understand the specific needs of different tree species and use proper pruning techniques to promote healthy growth and prevent disease. We remove dead, diseased, or damaged branches to improve the tree's overall health and appearance. We also trim branches that are interfering with power lines, buildings, or other structures. Our goal is to enhance the natural beauty of your trees while ensuring their long-term health and safety.

We understand that Minneapolis's harsh winters can put stress on trees, making them more susceptible to damage. Regular trimming can help to prevent branches from breaking under the weight of snow and ice. We also offer specialized pruning services to address specific issues, such as thinning the crown to allow for more sunlight penetration or shaping the tree to improve its appearance. We are committed to providing exceptional service and exceeding your expectations. Our team is fully licensed and insured, and we adhere to strict safety standards. Contact us today for a free consultation and let us help you keep your trees healthy and beautiful.
process: Step 1: Tree Assessment - We evaluate the tree's health and identify any problem areas.
Step 2: Pruning Plan - We develop a pruning plan based on the tree's specific needs.
Step 3: Tree Trimming - Our skilled arborists trim the tree using proper techniques.
Step 4: Debris Removal - We remove all debris and leave your property clean.

faq.question: How often should I trim my trees?
faq.answer: The frequency of tree trimming depends on the species of tree and its growth rate. Generally, mature trees should be trimmed every 3-5 years, while younger trees may need more frequent trimming.

faq.question: What is the best time of year to trim trees?
faq.answer: The best time of year to trim trees is typically during the dormant season (late fall or early winter). However, some species may benefit from trimming at other times of the year. We can advise you on the best time to trim your specific trees.

faq.question: Can you trim trees near power lines?
faq.answer: Yes, we are qualified to trim trees near power lines. We use specialized equipment and techniques to ensure the safety of our team and your property.

services.name: Emergency Tree Service
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency tree removal and storm damage cleanup.
services.description:
When a storm hits Minneapolis, trees can pose a serious threat to your property and safety. Blue Ribbon Pruning offers 24/7 emergency tree service to quickly address hazardous situations. Whether a tree has fallen on your house, is blocking your driveway, or is threatening to fall, we are available to provide immediate assistance. Our experienced team is equipped to handle even the most challenging emergency tree removal situations. We understand the urgency of these situations and respond promptly to minimize further damage to your property.

We work closely with insurance companies to ensure a smooth and hassle-free claims process. Our team is trained to assess the damage, document the incident, and provide the necessary information to your insurance adjuster. We are committed to providing reliable, efficient, and affordable emergency tree service. We understand that these situations can be stressful, and we strive to make the process as easy as possible for you. We are fully licensed and insured, protecting you from liability. Contact us anytime, day or night, for emergency tree service in Minneapolis.
process: Step 1: Emergency Response - We respond quickly to your call for assistance.
Step 2: Hazard Assessment - We assess the situation and identify any hazards.
Step 3: Tree Removal - We safely remove the tree or branches.
Step 4: Debris Removal - We remove all debris and leave your property safe.

faq.question: What should I do if a tree falls on my house?
faq.answer: If a tree falls on your house, immediately evacuate the area and call 911 if there is a risk of injury. Then, contact your insurance company and Blue Ribbon Pruning for emergency tree service.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency calls as quickly as possible. Our response time depends on our current workload and the location of the emergency, but we typically arrive within a few hours.

faq.question: Will my insurance cover emergency tree removal?
faq.answer: In most cases, your insurance will cover emergency tree removal if the tree caused damage to your property. We can work with your insurance company to ensure a smooth claims process.

services.name: Land Clearing
services.shortDescription: Prepare your property for construction with professional land clearing services.
services.description:
Planning a new construction project in Minneapolis? Blue Ribbon Pruning offers professional land clearing services to prepare your property for building. We can remove trees, shrubs, and other vegetation to create a clean and level building site. Our experienced team has the equipment and expertise to handle even the most challenging land clearing projects. We understand the importance of minimizing environmental impact and use responsible land clearing practices.

We work closely with developers, contractors, and homeowners to ensure that the land clearing process meets their specific needs. We can also provide grading and excavation services to prepare the site for foundation work. We are committed to providing efficient, affordable, and reliable land clearing services. Our team is fully licensed and insured, and we adhere to strict safety standards. Contact us today for a free consultation and let us help you prepare your property for success.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the property and identify any challenges.
Step 2: Land Clearing Plan - We develop a land clearing plan based on your needs.
Step 3: Vegetation Removal - We remove trees, shrubs, and other vegetation.
Step 4: Grading and Excavation - We grade and excavate the site as needed.
benefits: Creates a clean and level building site

faq.question: What permits are required for land clearing?
faq.answer: The permits required for land clearing depend on the size and location of the property. We can help you determine which permits are necessary and assist with the application process.

faq.question: How long does land clearing take?
faq.answer: The time it takes to clear land depends on the size of the property and the amount of vegetation that needs to be removed. We can provide you with an estimated timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: What do you do with the removed vegetation?
faq.answer: We can either remove the vegetation from the property or chip it and use it as mulch. We will discuss your preferences during the initial assessment.

services.name: Storm Damage Cleanup
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive cleanup services after severe storms.
services.description:
Minneapolis storms can leave behind a trail of destruction, including fallen trees, broken branches, and scattered debris. Blue Ribbon Pruning offers comprehensive storm damage cleanup services to help you restore your property quickly and safely. Our experienced team is equipped to handle even the most challenging storm damage situations. We can remove fallen trees, clear debris, and repair damaged structures. We understand the importance of acting quickly to prevent further damage and ensure the safety of your property.

We work closely with insurance companies to ensure a smooth and hassle-free claims process. Our team is trained to assess the damage, document the incident, and provide the necessary information to your insurance adjuster. We are committed to providing reliable, efficient, and affordable storm damage cleanup services. We understand that these situations can be stressful, and we strive to make the process as easy as possible for you. We are fully licensed and insured, protecting you from liability. Contact us today for immediate assistance with storm damage cleanup.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment - We assess the extent of the storm damage.
Step 2: Debris Removal - We remove fallen trees, branches, and other debris.
Step 3: Structure Repair - We repair damaged structures as needed.
Step 4: Site Restoration - We restore the property to its original condition.

faq.question: How can I prevent storm damage to my trees?
faq.answer: Regular tree trimming can help to prevent storm damage by removing dead, diseased, or weakened branches. You should also have your trees inspected regularly by a certified arborist.

faq.question: What should I do if a tree falls on my car?
faq.answer: If a tree falls on your car, immediately contact your insurance company and Blue Ribbon Pruning for assistance. Do not attempt to move the tree yourself.

faq.question: How much does storm damage cleanup cost?
faq.answer: The cost of storm damage cleanup depends on the extent of the damage. We can provide you with a free estimate after assessing the situation.

serviceAreas.content:
Blue Ribbon Pruning is proud to offer expert tree removal services to the residents of St. Paul, Minnesota. From the historic Victorian-era homes along Summit Avenue to the vibrant neighborhoods throughout the city, we understand the unique challenges and needs of maintaining healthy trees in an urban environment. Our certified arborists are equipped to handle any tree removal project, big or small, with safety and precision. 

We are also very familiar with the extreme cold winters that plague the area, which can damage trees. We offer emergency tree removal services to deal with storm damage, as well as preventative pruning and maintenance to help protect your trees from the elements. Trust Blue Ribbon Pruning to keep your St. Paul property safe and beautiful.
serviceAreas.localContext: St. Paul is known for its beautiful Victorian architecture, especially the grand homes on Summit Avenue, and experiences harsh winters that can impact tree health.

Our team is experienced in navigating the specific challenges of tree removal in established suburban neighborhoods, ensuring minimal disruption to your property and surrounding landscape. reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Blue Ribbon Pruning did an excellent job removing a large, dying oak tree from my backyard. They were professional, efficient, and took great care to protect my property. The price was fair, and the cleanup was thorough. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I had two ugly stumps in my front yard that I wanted gone. Blue Ribbon Pruning came out and ground them down quickly and efficiently. They filled the holes with topsoil and seeded the area. Looks great!

reviews.name: Emily L.
reviews.text: Our maple tree was overgrown and blocking sunlight from our house. Blue Ribbon Pruning trimmed it back beautifully, opening up the view and letting in more light. They were very knowledgeable and provided helpful advice on tree care.

reviews.name: Tom S.
reviews.text: A large branch fell on my roof during a storm. Blue Ribbon Pruning responded quickly and removed the branch safely. They prevented further damage to my house and were very professional and courteous.

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: Blue Ribbon Pruning cleared a heavily wooded area on my property to make way for a new garden. They did an excellent job removing the trees and brush, and the site is now perfectly prepared for planting.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Good service, professional crew, and competitive price. They removed a large ash tree that was infested with Emerald Ash Borer. They were careful to avoid damaging my fence. Would use again.
